name: National Building Code of India 2016 (with 2024 amendments)
name_hi: भारत का राष्ट्रीय भवन निर्माण संहिता 2016 (2024 संशोधनों सहित)
scope: Mandatory for most building projects in India — broader in coverage than CPWD DSR. Adopted by State PWDs, Urban Local Bodies, Development Authorities, and most municipal building bylaws.

parts.title: Integrated Approach — Prerequisites for Applying Provisions
Development Control Rules & General Building Requirements
Structural Design (incl. sub-parts: Loads, Foundations, Masonry, Concrete, Steel, Timber, Aluminium, Glass)
Building Services (Lighting, Air-Conditioning, Acoustics, Lifts, Electrical, Solar)
Plumbing Services (Water Supply, Drainage, Solid Waste, Gas Supply)

description: Enables OCERP built-in validation rules that check building projects against the National Building Code of India 2016 + 2024 amendments. Validates fire & life safety (Part 4: travel distance, refuge area, sprinkler requirement), structural design basis (Part 6: IS-code reference present per material), building services (Part 8: lift requirement vs occupancy, fire-detection), plumbing (Part 9: water-supply demand, drainage slope), and landscape/sustainability (Parts 10-11).
description_hi: एनबीसी 2016 + 2024 संशोधनों के अनुसार भवन परियोजनाओं की जाँच — अग्नि एवं जीवन सुरक्षा, संरचनात्मक डिज़ाइन, भवन सेवाएँ एवं नल-व्यवस्था।
